title: Canada Transport Sector Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q3 2025
content: In the third quarter of 2025, total vehicle sales remained steady, recording a marginal YoY rise of 0.17%. ZEV sales reported a fall of 30,422 (down 40.14% YoY) from Q3 2024 to Q3 2025. ZEV penetration continued to stay below the 10% mark for a third consecutive quarter. Battery Electric Vehicles (BEVs) recorded a fall of 29,405 (down 52.32% YoY) from Q3 2024 to Q3 2025. Battery Electric Vehicles (BEVs) recorded a fall of 29,405 (down 52.32% YoY) from Q3 2024 to Q3 2025.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
